e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The emitted fourth-arm fkwu binary now parses native HTTP/TLS response headers into the same http_get dict shape as sibling kernels and can read those receipts through native _get, allowing model-vitality rows to prove production runtime authority without Go/Rust/TypeScript assistance.
test_flows: Focused Form bands prove model-vitality row semantics and Hati-OS walker/lowering still agree.
Live probe builds fkwu, fetches public HTTP and HTTPS through every kernel, and verifies fkwu TLS is native.
Live probe has fkwu fetch the production runtime endpoint, count 14 response headers, and read native-kernel plus x-form-python-authority=false through model-vitality rows.
